summary: Backend: 11/11 pytest passing for auth, habits CRUD+complete+streak+double-block, tasks CRUD+complete+uncomplete refund, rewards CRUD+redeem (incl. insufficient balance 400), redemptions/transactions/stats. Frontend: register/login/logout/protected-route redirect to /login all work; coin-balance shows in nav; Habits & Tasks creation via modal works (entities render on page); Rewards create via reward-* testids works. Unable to click habit-complete / task-complete / reward-redeem buttons from Playwright because they lack data-testid attributes and their accessible names are not 'Complete'/'Redeem' (likely icon-only or custom labels).

integration_issues.issue: No data-testid on complete button; could not trigger complete from UI test (backend endpoint works fine).
No data-testid on task complete button.

action_items: Add promised data-testids: habit-form-name, habit-form-difficulty, habit-form-submit, habit-complete-{id}, task-form-name, task-form-submit, task-complete-{id}, reward-redeem-{id} (request listed them but they don't exist in src).
Either rename modal submit button to 'Create Habit'/'Create Task' or add dedicated testids so tests can discover it uniquely (currently just 'Create').
Consider exposing a visible text label on complete/redeem buttons (currently seem icon-only) for accessibility + testability.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py list_tasks does 3 redundant sorts; keep only the combined key to avoid confusion.
complete_habit recomputes coins from habit doc even after difficulty edit — fine, but document the behavior.
clean_user omits created_at from response typing but still returns it; acceptable.
CORS allow_origins falls back to '*' with allow_credentials=True which browsers reject for cookies; for cookie-auth ensure CORS_ORIGINS is set explicitly in deployment.

success_rate.frontend: ~80% (create/logout/protected pass; complete/redeem not exercised through UI)

test_credentials: admin@example.com / admin123 (verified login). Test users created dynamically with test_<uuid>@example.com / test1234.
seed_data_creation: Seeded ephemeral TEST_ habits/tasks/rewards per test (deleted after).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend suite at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py is a reliable regression. For frontend UI testing of complete/redeem flows, wait for main agent to add data-testids (habit-complete-{id}, task-complete-{id}, reward-redeem-{id}) then use those. Email is lowercased by backend on register — use lowercase locally when asserting.
rca of the issue: N/A — no functional bugs found. The only gap is missing UI test hooks (data-testid) on action buttons, which blocked end-to-end UI coverage of complete/redeem. The corresponding backend endpoints were verified via pytest.
